author: Paulinfresno
body_html:
<div class="md"><p>Crystal Springs. The Peninsula is beautiful once you get off 101.</p>
</div>

replies.author: btribble
replies.body_html:
<div class="md"><p>It sits directly above the San Andreas fault. The hills on the opposite side of the lake are moving slowly Northward (to the right).</p>
</div>
